info.name: Language Switcher
info.summary: Adds a language switcher to the Nextcloud header for both authenticated and public pages
info.description:
A Language Switcher App for Nextcloud
Adds a language switcher dropdown to the header bar, allowing users to change the interface language on the fly.
**Features**
- Switch language directly from the header bar — no need to visit settings - Works for logged-in users — saves the selected language as user preference - Works on public share pages — visitors can choose their language via session cookie - Admin settings — choose from 6 icon styles, adjust size, stroke width and color - Language filter — admins can restrict which languages are available - Supports 100+ languages out of the box - Compatible with Nextcloud 27–33 - Full dark mode support
**Requirements**
- Nextcloud 27 or newer - PHP intl extension recommended for native language names
[Report a bug](https://github.com/sashd3/ak-language-switcher/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
[Request a feature](https://github.com/sashd3/ak-language-switcher/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)
[Buy me a slice of pizza](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/sas4)
[Support on Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/aarekraft.dev)
info.author: aarekraft.dev - Sash Wegmüller
